hooks.command: cd "${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR:-$HOME/Repos/carlthome/rustler}" && if command -v cargo &>/dev/null; then cargo check --message-format short 2>&1 | tail -20; else echo '⚠️  cargo not on PATH'; fi
if [[ "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH:-}" == *.rs ]] && command -v rustfmt &>/dev/null; then rustfmt "${CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH}" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

python3 -c "import sys, json, os; d = json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT', '{}')); cmd = d.get('command', ''); exit(2 if ('rm' in cmd and 'resources/' in cmd) else 0)" && true || (echo 'Blocked: do not delete files from resources/ — game assets must be preserved'; exit 1)
